title: Divine transport from Puhar to Manipallavam
claim_or_observation: The goddess carries sleeping Manimekalai away from Puhar to Manipallavam
notes: Verify travel verbs direction and elapsed time against original Tamil

title: Manipallavam sacred landscape
claim_or_observation: Manipallavam contains sacred features connected with the Buddha the Gomukhi pond memory of births and the Amudhasurabhi
notes: Create line-level place concordance before final design

title: Human ships reach Manipallavam
claim_or_observation: Merchant parties travel to Manipallavam and are able to return to the island
notes: Confirms literary island is not only a dream or divine realm

title: Manipallavam and Naga dynastic memory
claim_or_observation: The island is connected to Naga rulers political kinship and the story of a Chola child entrusted to a merchant
notes: Names kinship sequence and route require Tamil verification

title: Puhar destruction geography
claim_or_observation: The lost child shipwreck royal grief missed festival and destruction of Puhar are linked in the narrative
notes: Literary causal sequence is not archaeological proof of one event

title: Kantharodai early historic settlement
claim_or_observation: Early historic occupation at Kantharodai began broadly around 400 to 100 BCE and the site became a major northern Sri Lankan settlement
notes: Provides regional context not Manipallavam identification

title: Jaffna peninsula maritime network
claim_or_observation: Ports and trade settlements around the Jaffna Peninsula including Kayts were connected with Kantharodai as an inland focus
notes: Chronology and individual harbour functions require specialist review

title: Kantharodai settled agriculture
claim_or_observation: Kantharodai has evidence for rice millet pulses and settled early historic subsistence
notes: Supports inhabited regional landscape rather than exact epic diet

title: Mantai transregional hub
claim_or_observation: Mantai operated as a trade hub linking the Arabian Sea Bay of Bengal Indian coasts and Sri Lankan interior from the first millennium BCE onward
notes: Comparative northern Sri Lankan maritime evidence

title: Mantai shallow-water transshipment logic
claim_or_observation: Shallow channels favoured differences between large-vessel anchorage and smaller-boat movement through the strait
notes: Not direct proof of Manipallavam landing practice

title: Karur Vanchi and Chera association
claim_or_observation: Government archaeology records associate Karur with Vanchi Karuvur Chera rulers and nearby Pugalur inscriptions
notes: Competing Vanji identifications still require review

title: Karur early historic trade assemblage
claim_or_observation: Karur excavations yielded Tamil-Brahmi sherds Roman coins precious stones rouletted ware amphora fragments bricks and iron objects
notes: Supports inland trade centre and production design materials

title: Early Tamilakam route networks
claim_or_observation: Archaeological evidence supports interconnected coastal inland river and mountain-pass routes among ports and production centres
notes: Does not establish Manimekalai's exact itinerary

title: Manipallavam Nainativu identification unproven
claim_or_observation: A longstanding identification with Nainativu is a hypothesis and has not been archaeologically proven
notes: Binding map production and publicity rule

title: Naga identity not modern ethnicity
claim_or_observation: The epic's Naga labels must not be mapped automatically to one modern ethnic national or racial group
notes: Includes explicit exclusion of Northeast Indian Naga conflation

title: Regional archaeology is not literary identification
claim_or_observation: Evidence from Kantharodai Mantai Kayts or Nainativu establishes context but does not identify any site as Manipallavam
notes: Binding scholarly and publicity rule

title: Three-layer production atlas
claim_or_observation: The atlas separates textual historical and cinematic geography and displays confidence levels
notes: Requires cartographic archaeological and literary review

title: Distinct travel time systems
claim_or_observation: Walking overland travel merchant sailing divine transport and previous-birth memory use different temporal and visual grammars
notes: Supports editing sound costume and continuity planning

title: No fixed yojana conversion
claim_or_observation: Ancient distance units and translated numerical distances must not be converted into one exact modern coordinate without textual and metrological review
notes: Binding maps dialogue and publicity rule

title: Karur is provisional Vanji anchor
claim_or_observation: Karur Amaravati is the principal production anchor for Vanji but not declared the only possible Vanchi across all periods and texts
notes: Binding historical framing rule

title: Northern Sri Lankan island-zone Manipallavam
claim_or_observation: Manipallavam will be designed from a northern Sri Lankan low-island environmental hypothesis without copying one modern island
notes: Requires geology ecology archaeology and community consultation

title: No exclusive modern ownership from archaeology
claim_or_observation: Northern Sri Lankan archaeology must not be used by the production to award exclusive ancient ownership to a modern community
notes: Binding consultation and publicity rule
